chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-5311 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 18.09.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- The termination notice issued to the petitioner dates back to 2006, while the petition has been filed in 2023. We directed the petitioner to address this Court on the maintainability of the petition on account of laches. Today, despite this being a date fixed matter, the petitioner is called absent without any intimation. In light of this, we find the petition as not maintainable on account of laches and dismiss it on these grounds. Furthermore, the petition is also dismissed for non-prosecution, as it appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
